use_cases: Primary navigation drawer for landing pages and web apps
Mobile-style hamburger menu with smooth slide animations
Dark/light themed navigation with mode toggle
Swipe-to-dismiss sidebar navigation for touch devices
ai_summary: An animated hamburger menu component featuring a slide-out sidebar drawer with smooth Framer Motion spring animations, dark/light mode toggle, and drag-to-close gesture support. The menu includes navigation items with icons, a glass-morphism overlay backdrop, and orthogonal grid background styling. Best suited for modern web applications requiring a polished, interactive mobile-first navigation experience.
